name: Apex Haven | A Demi Zoo
description:
Demi-human or Human User 

TW: Nothing intended, but NPCs can be random.

Welcome to Apex Haven, a zoo that specializes in exotic, often rare demi-humans. The zoo has various enclosures with big cats, birds, ferocious canines, and even mixed enclosures. Don’t worry, our demi-humans get along… most of the time! And some lucky guests might even get to watch demi-human mating in action!

The RPG was created with DemiPOV in mind, but I’m trying to write the bot to pretty much let you choose any role. You can probably be a guest, zoo employee, and possibly even a furry resident. There are several initial message options:

Option 1: Mixed Enclosure

Option 2: Cat Enclosure

Option 3: Canine Enclosure

Option 4: Bird Enclosure

Option 5: Blank Intro (aka, define your own enclosure)

The defined initial messages are going to be mostly identical with minor tweaks for the types of residents. I am starting with the mixed enclosure in case you forget to change (like I keep doing).

Since there’s no reference to the user in the initial messages, you can just determine how you’re going to interact. Maybe you follow Tina and Chuck into the enclosure as another employee. Or you just start trying to interact with one of the demis (make them up, whatever you want).

Image from Gemini
creator: KitKat73
